ContactFormBlock.subtitle: Let's Connect
ContactFormBlock.title: We'd love to hear from you.
ContactFormBlock.description: Whether you want to volunteer, partner on a campus initiative, or just say hello, drop us a line below and our team will get back to you soon.
ContactFormBlock.securityDescription: We only use your information to respond to your inquiry. We never share your data with third parties.
ContactFormBlock.errorMessage: Unable to send your message right now. Please try again later.
ContactFormBlock.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. Your message has been planted in our inbox, and we'll get back to you as soon as it sprouts.

form.eventLabel: Which event do you want to participate in?
form.messagePlaceholder: How can we help you today?
